title: DTL Delay - Bukit Panjang to Botanic Gardens

title_translations.zh-Hans: DTL 服务延误 - 武吉班让至植物园
title_translations.ms: DTL Kelewatan Perkhidmatan - Bukit Panjang ke Botanic Gardens
title_translations.ta: DTL சேவை தாமதம் - புக் பிட் பாஞ் முதல் பாட்டானிக் கார்டன்ஸ் வரை

updates.text: Attention commuters: Train service progressively returning to normal (both directions).
09:26-DTL-Minor delay. Train service is progressively resuming between Botanic Gardens and Stevens stations (towards Expo).  Please expect longer travelling time.
Attention Commuters: Additional travel time of 15 mins is expected between Bukit Panjang and Botanic Gardens (both directions). Commuters can continue to use the train service.
